title: verify-ehbp-key-binding output
description: stdout JSON produced by `tinfoil-conformance verify-ehbp-key-binding`. Tinfoil SPEC §14.2 EHBP key-binding verdict. Exit 0 = bound (accept), 10 = binding violation (reject), 30 = malformed input.

attested_hpke_public_key_hex.description: Lowercase-hex HPKE X25519 public key the SDK extracted from report_data[32:64] — the key it bound the transport to. On accept this equals the offered key.

tls_fingerprint_hex.description: Lowercase-hex TLS SPKI fingerprint the SDK extracted from report_data[0:32], surfaced so a wrong-offset extraction is observable.

code.description: SPEC §14.2-anchored rejection code. EHBP_KEY_BINDING_MISMATCH: the offered HPKE key does not equal report_data[32:64] (key swap / MITM); the SDK must fail closed. Malformed inputs (report_data not 64 bytes, offered key not a well-formed 32-byte X25519 key) are reported via exit code 30, not a rejection.

spec_ref.description: Optional SPEC.md section the failing check is anchored to.
